testcase.name: should generate intelligent post successfully
should validate required parameters
should handle invalid agent type gracefully
should handle concurrent requests
should process batch requests successfully
should validate batch requests array
should handle empty batch requests
should handle large batch requests efficiently
should analyze content quality successfully
should validate content parameter
should handle very long content
should return system analytics successfully
should handle analytics request with query parameters
should return health status successfully
should respond quickly for health checks

testcase.classname: API Endpoints Integration Tests › error handling and resilience
testcase.name: should handle malformed JSON gracefully

testcase.name: should complete assessment within performance requirements
should handle batch processing efficiently
should maintain consistency across multiple assessments
should load core templates on initialization
should define proper template structure
should compose content for valid agent type
should throw error for unknown agent type
should populate elements correctly
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality
Expected: "Complete project documentation" Received: "Complete documentation" at Object.toEqual (/workspaces/agent-feed/prod/tests/unit/content-template-engine.test.js:99:60)

testcase.name: should handle missing user data gracefully
should populate all required elements
should handle empty elements array
should extract task description from userData
should generate priority reasoning based on impact
should extract meeting purpose from context
should provide fallback for unknown elements
should generate reasoning for P1 priority
should generate reasoning for P3 priority
should handle missing priority with default
should assemble task structure correctly
should assemble meeting prep structure correctly
should calculate word count and read time accurately
should handle unknown structure with default assembly
should assemble follow-up structure with arrays
should assemble idea structure correctly
should complete content composition within time limit
should handle concurrent composition requests
should orchestrate all phases of post generation correctly
should handle errors gracefully and throw PostingIntelligenceError
should meet performance requirement of <200ms for post composition
should create properly structured final post package
should process multiple posts with intelligence sharing
should achieve 100 posts/minute throughput requirement
should generate quality recommendations when score is below threshold
should generate impact recommendations when score is low
should compose content for personal-todos agent type
should compose content for meeting-prep agent type
should throw error for unsupported agent type
should generate reasoning for P1 priority
should generate reasoning for P3 priority
should default to P3 reasoning for unknown priority
should analyze content with high revenue impact
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThan(expected)
Expected: > 0.5 Received: 0.33099999999999996 at Object.toBeGreaterThan (/workspaces/agent-feed/prod/tests/unit/posting-intelligence-framework.test.js:457:34)

testcase.name: should analyze content with low business impact
should generate improvements for low scores
should detect revenue keywords and calculate score
should handle content with no revenue keywords
should detect efficiency keywords and apply priority multiplier
should apply lower multiplier for lower priority tasks
should handle template engine failures gracefully
should handle partial failures in optimization pipeline
should handle high-volume batch processing efficiently
should maintain performance under memory pressure

should test individual component loading with mocks
should simulate main.tsx execution flow
should test ErrorBoundary dependency chain
